description: Create a miniSEED file at /home/ga/noto_event_data.mseed containing waveform data for all GE network stations. The data must cover the time window from exactly 60 seconds before to exactly 600 seconds after the origin time of the Noto Peninsula earthquake as recorded in the SeisComP database. Extract the waveform records from the SDS archive at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive/ and ensure the output file only contains the requested ~11-minute duration.
